reviews.review_description: What a cute, little game and it's FREE! You wield a staff in one hand and a sword in the other to attack the wicked balloons trying to steal the kitties. You can pull the balloons in and slash them, gaining extra points for combos. There is a brief tutorial to get you acclimated to the controls. It is a simple but entertaining game for all ages!

Unique game idea 

..who knew balloons could be so wicked?
